_comment: Per-facet expected values for scripts/audit_facet.py. Each entry lists the CAS numbers of oils (mixtures without structural IDs) and isolates (with PubChem CID + GHS codes). Additional flags drive facet-specific safety probes (ifra_phenolic, sensitizer_required_cas, peroxide_required_cas) and chemistry probes (biosynthetic_chains, isolate formula/mw/cid expected values). Seed data derived from v32 of perfumery_data.js and historical audit scripts in /tmp/.

lavender.description: Lavandula angustifolia — linalool/linalyl-acetate cluster + β-caryophyllene/(E)-β-ocimene/terpinen-4-ol minor cross-tags

lavandin.description: Lavandula × intermedia — camphor-shifted linalool cluster + 1,8-cineole/borneol cross-tags

sage.description: Salvia spp. — sclareol + thujone + sclareolide/manool diterpene amber-precursor cluster + linalyl acetate (clary marker) + 1,8-cineole + sabinyl acetate (Spanish sage marker) cross-tags

thyme.description: Thymus spp. + Origanum + Satureja — phenolic sensitizer cluster + α-terpinene biosynthetic precursor + borneol cross-tag

basil.description: Ocimum spp. — chavicol / eugenol / methyl-eugenol chemotypes + linalool sweet-basil cross-tag + 1,8-cineole

bergamot.description: Citrus bergamia — cold-pressed peel oil + furanocoumarin + linalyl/terpinyl ester cluster

tarragon.description: Artemisia dracunculus (French chemotype) — estragole-rich with sabinene + ocimene + phellandrene terpene fingerprint

fennel.description: Foeniculum vulgare — anethole + estragole + fenchone cluster; sweet (dulce) and bitter (vulgare) chemotypes

anise.description: Anethole-dominated herbal-spicy cluster — Pimpinella anisum (true anise) + Illicium verum (star anise) + cross-tagged anethole materials from fennel / tarragon / basil

clove.description: Syzygium aromaticum — eugenol-dominated phenolic sensitiser cluster; bud + leaf oils plus isoeugenol / eugenyl acetate derivatives

rose.description: Rosa damascena + Rosa centifolia — citronellol / geraniol / PEA / damascenone floral cluster; opens the Floral family as first-class primary home

pepper.description: Piper nigrum (black pepper) + Schinus molle (pink pepper) — fresh-spicy cluster anchored by β-caryophyllene + α/β-phellandrene + sabinene

tobacco.description: Nicotiana tabacum absolute + coumarin/tonka anchor — dry wood Fougère base + hay/liatrix clover-cross. Opens the smoky / balsamic cross-family cluster (+ styrallyl acetate sweet-tobacco modifier)

jasmine.description: Jasminum grandiflorum + J. sambac — indolic floral cluster with benzyl acetate / indole / methyl jasmonate fingerprint (expanded via ylang + tuberose cluster cross-tags)

nutmeg.description: Myristica fragrans (nutmeg seed + mace aril) + myristicin + elemicin phenylpropanoid cluster

neroli.description: Citrus aurantium var. amara — Neroli Oil (distilled flower) + Petitgrain (leaf) + Orange Flower Absolute + Methyl Anthranilate + Nerolidol. Bridge between citrus and floral families

oakmoss.description: Evernia prunastri + Pseudevernia furfuracea + Evernyl synthetic. Chypre mossy-woods foundation; atranol/chloroatranol restricted post-SCCNFP 2000

cedar.description: Juniperus virginiana + Cedrus atlantica + Cedrol / Cedryl Acetate / Iso E Super woody-cedar cluster

vetiver.description: Chrysopogon zizanioides (Haitian / Javanese / Bourbon) + sesquiterpene isolates

ylang.description: Cananga odorata — p-cresyl methyl ether / methyl benzoate / benzyl salicylate cluster

ginger.description: Zingiber officinale — zingiberene / sesquiphellandrene / ar-curcumene sesquiterpene cluster + citral top

cardamom.description: Elettaria cardamomum — α-terpinyl acetate + 1,8-cineole cluster (shares molecules with pine / bergamot / pepper facets)

pine.description: Pinus sylvestris + Abies sibirica coniferous cluster — α-pinene/β-pinene/bornyl acetate dominated

labdanum.description: Cistus ladanifer — labdane diterpene amber base

amber.description: Amber base accord — labdanum + benzoin + ambroxide trio + sclareolide/manool clary-sage diterpene precursors + davana oil/davanone fruity-amber cross

tuberose.description: Polianthes tuberosa + lactonic peach / hexyl salicylate / methyl heptine carbonate white-floral cluster

chamomile.description: 4-species coverage: Chamaemelum nobile (Roman) + Matricaria recutita (German) + Ormenis multicaulis (Wild Moroccan) + Eriocephalus punctulatus (Cape) — angelate ester suite + α-bisabolol + chamazulene + bisabolol oxides A/B + Artemisia arborescens (blue chemotype cross-tag)

artemisia.description: Artemisia spp. — wormwood (A. absinthium) + mugwort (A. vulgaris) + davana (A. pallens) + herba-alba + arborescens + sweet wormwood (A. annua); thujone/davanone/artemisia-ketone/sabinyl-acetate cluster; tarragon (A. dracunculus) is its own facet

celery.description: Apium graveolens — phthalide-driven vegetal-herbal cluster (3-butylphthalide + ligustilide + butylidene phthalide); d-limonene (~60%) cross-tag + lovage cross-tags

dill.description: Anethum graveolens — Apiaceae 2-chemotype cluster (seed = (S)-(+)-carvone + dill apiole spicy; weed = α-phellandrene + dill ether green); Carum carvi (caraway) cross-genus S-carvone sibling; Mediterranean culinary aromatic; cross-Apiaceae with parsley apiole/myristicin

carnation.description: Dianthus caryophyllus — eugenol-driven floral-spice classic (Caron Bellodgia signature); natural absolute + methyl isoeugenol synthetic + cross-tags to eugenol/isoeugenol/eugenyl acetate/methyl eugenol/β-caryophyllene/benzyl benzoate

clover.description: Melilotus officinalis (sweet clover) + Hierochloe odorata (sweet grass) + Trilisa odoratissima (deer's tongue) — coumarin-driven hay-meadow cluster; foundational classical perfumery base (Caron Pour Un Homme, Guerlain Mouchoir de Monsieur, YSL Pour Homme); cross-tags coumarin + tonka bean absolute + dihydrocoumarin synthetic

medicinal.description: Cross-cutting descriptor facet — camphoraceous + phenolic + cooling-mint pharmaceutical character; spans lavender + thyme + sage + basil + eucalyptus + clove + wintergreen clusters; methyl salicylate + l-menthol/menthone defining markers

mimosa.description: Acacia dealbata + Acacia farnesiana — yellow-pompom anisic-powdery floral classic; heliotropin + anisaldehyde driven; iconic Caron Farnesiana, Hermès Champs-Elysées, Frédéric Malle Une Fleur de Cassie cluster

tea.description: Camellia sinensis cluster — Green + Black + White tea absolutes + theaspirane chemotaxonomic marker; iconic 1990s-modern niche perfumery accord (Bvlgari Eau Parfumée Vert/Noir/Blanc, Bois 1920 Sushi Imperiale, Elizabeth Arden Green Tea)

carrot_seed.description: Daucus carota — Apiaceae rooty-iris woody cluster; carotol + daucol + daucene + β-bisabolene sesquiterpene cluster; modern niche cornerstone (Hermès Eau d'Hermès) + iris-extender; α/β-pinene + sabinene + β-caryophyllene + geranyl acetate + d-limonene + myrcene + (E)-β-ocimene Apiaceae cross-chemistry

violet.description: Viola odorata flower + ionone violet-accord cluster — α/β-ionone + methyl ionone isomers + α-isomethyl ionone (modern industry-standard) + orris butter + α-irone iris-cross

violet_leaf.description: Viola odorata leaf cluster — green-leafy chemistry distinct from violet flower; methyl heptine carbonate + triplal + (E,Z)-2,6-nonadien-1-ol metallic-cucumber-leaf accord

lovage.description: Levisticum officinale — Apiaceae 'maggi-bouillon' meaty-savoury cluster; ligustilide-rich (30-70%) + sedanenolide + sedanonic anhydride + butylphthalide phthalide complex; α/β-pinene + α-phellandrene + d-limonene + myrcene Apiaceae cross-chemistry

parsley.description: Petroselinum crispum — 2-oil chemotype (seed = phenolic-ether apiole/myristicin spicy; leaf = green-fresh phellandrene/menthatriene/hexenol); Apiaceae cross-chemistry with celery + carrot + cilantro/coriander; cross-tags from existing α/β-phellandrene + α/β-pinene + myrcene + cis-3-hexenol/acetate + d-limonene

coriander.description: Coriandrum sativum seed — linalool-rich spicy-fresh (≠ cilantro leaf); S-(+)-linalool cross-tag from lavender

cumin.description: Cuminum cyminum seed + cuminaldehyde — warm-animalic spicy

geranium.description: Pelargonium graveolens — Bourbon + Egyptian chemotypes + rhodinol (citronellol/geraniol commercial mix) rose-geranium cluster

gourmand.description: Coffee + cocoa + maltol + ethyl maltol + furaneol — Edwards Soft Amber gourmand family

fruity.description: Fruity base — damascones + β-ionone + γ-nonalactone + raspberry ketone + furaneol + Roman chamomile angelate esters + Cape chamomile + davana oil + davanone fruity-amber cross-tags

iris.description: Iris pallida orris cluster — α-irone + α-ionone + methyl ionone powdery-violet base + carotol cross-tag

smoky.description: Smoky / leather base — guaiacol + cade + birch tar + isobutyl quinoline (+ styrallyl acetate modifier)

leather.description: Smoky leather base — cade + birch tar rectified + isobutyl quinoline + guaiacol (shared smoky subset)

green.description: Galbanum + cis-3-hexenol cluster — natural green foliage accord + celery vegetal + galbanum cluster + parsley leaf + 1,3,8-p-menthatriene + lovage + dill weed/ether + Camellia sinensis tea cluster (white/green/black + theaspirane)

oud.description: Aquilaria spp. — agarwood / oud cluster: regional chemotypes (Hindi/Assam, Cambodian) + synthetic captive (Norlimbanol) + agarofuran/agarospirol sesquiterpene markers; modern luxury cornerstone (Tom Ford Oud Wood, Maison Francis Kurkdjian, Amouage)

saffron.description: Crocus sativus stigma — modern niche-luxury cornerstone (Memo, Tom Ford, Penhaligon's); safranal-driven leathery-spicy with hydroxyisophorone + oxoisophorone tobacco-amber depth

galbanum.description: Ferula gummosa — iconic 20th-c green-resinous chypre cornerstone (Chanel No.19, Vent Vert, Cabochard, Must de Cartier); galbazine + (E,E)-decadienal markers; α/β-pinene + 3-carene chemotype cross-tags

musk.description: Synthetic white musks + natural ambrette — Galaxolide / Ethylene Brassylate / Exaltolide / Habanolide / Ambrette Seed

aquatic.description: Modern aquatic/marine accord — Calone 1951 + Helional + Floralozone + Melonal + Dihydromyrcenol

mint.description: Mentha spp. parent — peppermint + spearmint + cornmint + pennyroyal cluster; menthol/menthone + (R)-(-)-carvone + pulegone + menthofuran cooling/sweet/camphoraceous mint chemistry

peppermint.description: Mentha × piperita-specific — peppermint oil + menthol/menthone/menthofuran + cornmint cross-tag (high-menthol chemotype)

spearmint.description: Mentha spicata-specific — spearmint oil + (R)-(-)-carvone defining ~50-70%; lower menthol chemotype distinct from peppermint

minty.description: Cross-cutting descriptor facet — minty olfactive character beyond Mentha genus; spans pulegone + menthofuran (mint family) + thujones (sage/wormwood) + verbenone (rosemary) + phellandrenes + methyl salicylate (wintergreen) + tea tree + cornmint cross

cinnamon.description: Cinnamomum verum (Ceylon, bark + leaf) + C. cassia (Chinese) + cinnamaldehyde/cinnamyl alcohol/cinnamyl acetate

patchouli.description: Pogostemon cablin + patchoulol / norpatchoulenol / α-bulnesene sesquiterpenoid cluster

sandalwood.description: Santalum album (Mysore) + S. spicatum (Australian) + santalol isolates + Javanol synthetic. Opens the Woody primary home

vanilla.description: Vanilla planifolia + vanillin / ethyl vanillin / heliotropin + balsamic fixatives + liatrix vanilla-leaf cross. Opens the gourmand family primary home

phenolic.description: Cross-cutting descriptor — eugenol/thymol/carvacrol/guaiacol phenolic-aromatic character; spans clove + thyme + origanum + savory + cinnamon + cade + birch tar + parsley apiole/dill apiole

hay.description: Cross-cutting descriptor — coumarin-driven hay-meadow character; spans clover cluster (sweet clover + hay + liatrix absolutes) + lavender/lavandin/clary sage/rosemary/basil/tobacco/tonka/chamomile absolutes

leathery.description: Cross-cutting descriptor — leather-character olfactive note; spans clary sage absolute + tobacco + treemoss + saffron + oud (Hindi/synthetic) + black tea + isobutyl quinoline

earthy.description: Cross-cutting descriptor — earthy-rooty character; spans patchouli + vetiver + oakmoss + carrot seed (carotol/daucol) + linalool oxides + borneol

coniferous.description: Cross-cutting descriptor — coniferous pine/fir/cedar woody-resinous character; spans cedar (Virginian/Atlas) + pine + fir + cedarleaf + camphor terpenes (pinenes/camphene/3-carene) + bornyl/isobornyl/terpinyl acetates + longifolene

fir.description: Abies spp. — fir needle oil + bornyl/isobornyl acetate fir-marker isolates; sub-cluster of coniferous family

camphor.description: Cross-cutting descriptor — camphoraceous-cooling character; spans lavender/lavandin/sage/rosemary/eucalyptus/fennel/cedarleaf/wintergreen/Melaleuca cluster (tea tree/niaouli/cajeput)/pennyroyal + camphor/borneol/bornyl-acetate/eucalyptol/thujones/verbenone/fenchone/methyl-salicylate/pulegone isolates

coumarin.description: Cross-cutting descriptor — coumarin-class molecules + coumarin-rich naturals; spans tonka/sweet-clover/hay/liatrix absolutes + coumarin/dihydrocoumarin synthetics + bergapten + lavender/lavandin absolutes

honey.description: Cross-cutting descriptor — honey-floral-sweet character; spans rose absolute + cassie absolute + phenylethyl alcohol + α-bisabolol

creamy.description: Cross-cutting descriptor — creamy-soft character; spans Ho Wood + Rosewood (linalool-rich) + linalool oxide pyranoid + γ-nonalactone (coconut/peach lactone)

caramel.description: Cross-cutting descriptor — caramel-burnt-sugar character; defining gourmand pyranone class — maltol + ethyl maltol (cotton candy/Angel) + furaneol (strawberry-pineapple)

tonka.description: Dipteryx odorata cluster — tonka bean absolute + coumarin defining isolate; classical fougère + soft amber base material

orange_blossom.description: Citrus aurantium flower cluster — neroli + orange flower absolute + methyl anthranilate; Floral Amber sub-family transition material

resin.description: Cross-cutting descriptor — resinous-balsamic character; spans labdanum/frankincense/myrrh/galbanum cluster + Cambodian oud + elemicin

ambergris.description: Modern ambroxan-driven amber descriptor cluster — Iso E Super (Hercolyn-class woody-amber) + sclareol/sclareolide/Ambroxide Cetalox-class precursors; iconic Sauvage/Aventus/Olympéa modern amber wave

gardenia.description: Gardenia jasminoides accord cluster — hexyl salicylate + styrallyl acetate + tuberose absolute share white-floral creamy-green territory; mostly synthetic accord (true gardenia absolute extremely rare)

lily.description: Lilium genus accord cluster — synthetic floral materials evoking lily smell; ethyl linalool + α-terpineol classical lily building blocks (vs. muguet which is Convallaria)

hyacinth.description: Hyacinthus orientalis accord — green-floral ozonic; cinnamyl alcohol + supporting markers; mostly synthetic accord (natural hyacinth absolute heavily restricted)

apple.description: Apple accord cluster — damascenone + α-damascone + cis-3-hexenyl acetate + Roman chamomile (apple character) — Malus aroma-network

berry.description: Generic berry descriptor — pink pepper + ionones (red-fruit ionone aspect) + raspberry ketone; parent facet for strawberry/raspberry sub-clusters

peach.description: Peach accord cluster — γ-lactones (γ-decalactone iconic peach + γ-undecalactone aldehyde C-14 + γ-nonalactone coconut-peach)

plum.description: Plum accord cluster — α-damascone + δ-damascone red-fruit damascone variants; classical Mitsouko-class plum signature

strawberry.description: Strawberry accord cluster — methyl cinnamate (strawberry-leaf) + furaneol (strawberry furanone) defining synthetic accord

rosewood.description: Aniba rosaeodora + Cinnamomum camphora (Ho Wood) — linalool-rich woods; ~80% linalool; CITES II (Bois de Rose); modern niche replacement: Ho Wood

clean.description: Cross-cutting descriptor — clean / soapy / fresh-laundry character; spans linalool/tetrahydrolinalool + dihydromyrcenol (calone-class) + eucalyptol + Hedione + Javanol + vetiveryl acetate (clean musk-bridge)

marine.description: Calone-class marine accord — Calone 1951 + Helional defining 1990s 'aqua' synthetic seascape (l'Eau d'Issey, Cool Water, Acqua di Giò)

ozonic.description: Ozone-rain accord — Helional + Floralozone defining 'after-rain' fresh-air synthetic; modern Water/aquatic facet bridge

animalic.description: Cross-cutting descriptor — generic animalic-warm character; macrocyclic musks (Exaltolide) + Ambrette + Hindi oud; parent facet for civet/castoreum/musk sub-clusters

indole.description: Indole-class animalic descriptor — defining jasmine/orange flower fecal-floral character; indole isolate + jasmine/neroli absolutes (intrinsic ~2-5% indole content)

lemon.description: Citrus limon — sharp-zest cornerstone of Eau de Cologne (4711, Eau Impériale); defining 60-70% d-limonene + 5-15% β-pinene + 1-3% citral; phototoxic (Cat.5A=0.5%)

orange.description: Citrus sinensis — sweet-juicy cornerstone; 90-95% d-limonene driven; functional perfumery workhorse + Eau de Cologne classical

mandarin.description: Citrus reticulata — soft fruity-citrus; defining methyl-N-methyl-anthranilate green-floral signature + 65-75% limonene; Italian green/red grades

grapefruit.description: Citrus paradisi — bitter-fresh citrus; defining nootkatone (~0.1-1%) + 1-p-menthene-8-thiol (ppb level); modern fougère cornerstone

lime.description: Citrus aurantifolia — sharp piney-citrus; defining 50% d-limonene + 5-15% β-pinene + 5-10% γ-terpinene + 1-3% terpinen-4-ol; expressed = STRONGLY phototoxic (Cat.5A=0.2%)

yuzu.description: Citrus junos — Japanese yuzu; complex floral-grapefruit-mandarin hybrid; defining 70% d-limonene + 10-15% γ-terpinene + 1-3% linalool; modern niche darling

petitgrain.description: Citrus aurantium leaf/twig — linalyl acetate 50% / linalool 25%; ≠ neroli (flower) + ≠ orange (fruit); iconic Eau de Cologne + classical fougère material

citrus.description: Cross-cutting parent descriptor — generic citrus character; covers bergamot/lemon/orange/mandarin/grapefruit/lime/yuzu/petitgrain + citral isomers + d-limonene + α/β-pinene + γ-terpinene + nootkatone + methyl anthranilate

muguet.description: Lily of valley (Convallaria majalis) accord — synthetic only (natural extract impossible due to plant chemistry); hydroxycitronellal cornerstone (post-Lyral 2014 ban)

osmanthus.description: Osmanthus fragrans (sweet olive / gui hua) — apricot-leather-floral; γ-decalactone + β-ionone + linalool defining; ultra-premium Chinese luxury floral

magnolia.description: Magnolia spp. — citral-rich green-floral with linalool + methyl eugenol; modern niche-luxury alternative to rose/jasmine

cypress.description: Cupressus sempervirens (Mediterranean / Italian cypress) — α-pinene + 3-carene + cedrol-class woody-balsamic; modern niche cornerstone

civet.description: Civetone — synthetic macrocyclic ketone replacing natural civet (Viverra civetta); cruelty-free animalic for chypre/classical/niche-luxury

castoreum.description: Castoreum accord — synthetic blend replacing natural castoreum (Castor canadensis); cruelty-free phenolic-tar-musky for leather/animalic accords

lilac.description: Syringa vulgaris accord — synthetic spring-floral; α-terpineol + hydroxycitronellal + benzyl alcohol + heliotropin

lotus.description: Nelumbo nucifera accord — synthetic Asian sacred lotus; aquatic-floral

narcissus.description: Narcissus poeticus absolute — French Auvergne luxury floral; indolic-hay; ~$5-8k/kg

peony.description: Paeonia accord — synthetic dewy-floral; α-methylbenzyl alcohol cornerstone

freesia.description: Freesia refracta accord — synthetic watery-floral; linalool + Hedione + ionones

frangipani.description: Plumeria rubra accord — synthetic tropical-floral; jasmine-tuberose-coconut hybrid

champaca.description: Michelia champaca absolute — Indian luxury exotic floral; ~$8-12k/kg

honeysuckle.description: Lonicera accord — synthetic honey-floral; benzyl acetate + linalool + ionones

aldehyde.description: Aldehydic Soft Floral cluster — C-10/C-11/C-12 MNA aliphatic aldehydes; defining Chanel No. 5 (1921) classical aldehydic-floral genre

heliotrope.description: Heliotropium accord — synthetic cherry-pie / almond-vanilla floral; heliotropin + vanillin + benzyl alcohol

immortelle.description: Helichrysum italicum (everlasting flower / curry plant) — honey-curry-fenugreek Floral Amber cornerstone

cinnamic_floral.description: Cinnamic Floral Amber descriptor — cinnamaldehyde-driven cinnamic-floral cluster (Hermès Calèche, Estée Lauder Cinnabar)

vanillin.description: Vanillin synthetic — defining vanilla cornerstone; ~2% of vanilla bean naturally + industrial Reimer-Tiemann synthesis

chocolate.description: Chocolate accord cluster — cocoa absolute + vanillin gourmand-amber sweet-roasted

cocoa.description: Theobroma cacao — bitter dark-chocolate gourmand cluster

almond.description: Almond accord cluster — bitter almond oil + benzaldehyde + heliotrope cherry-pie marzipan-floral

beeswax.description: Cera alba — beeswax absolute honey-waxy fixative; iconic Soft Amber niche material

cherry.description: Cherry accord — benzaldehyde + heliotropin synthetic cherry-pie

benzoin.description: Styrax benzoin (Siam/Sumatra) — sweet vanillic-balsamic Amber fixative

peru_balsam.description: Myroxylon balsamum pereirae — PROHIBITED in EU cosmetics (skin sensitizer); reference material only

styrax.description: Liquidambar (Levant storax / American sweetgum) — cinnamic-resinous balsamic

elemi.description: Canarium luzonicum (Manila elemi) — fresh lemony-resinous; elemicin-rich

opoponax.description: Commiphora guidotti (sweet myrrh / bisabol myrrh) — sweet-balsamic warm-amber

ambrox.description: Ambroxide (Cetalox / Ambrox / Ambermor) — synthetic ambergris substitute; modern amber wave cornerstone

ambroxan.description: Ambroxan trade-name alias — same molecule as Ambroxide/Cetalox

ambrette.description: Hibiscus abelmoschus (ambrette seed) + ambrettolide synthetic macrolactone — clean-musk cornerstone

balsam.description: Cross-cutting balsamic descriptor — covers benzoin/tolu/peru/styrax/opoponax + labdanum + frankincense + myrrh
